calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Jun-08-2026 Continued To Aug-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
TENTATIVE RULING: Continued to 8/3/26. (No earlier availability.)
(1) An amendment was just e-filed on 5/27/26, which was not at least 15 days before this hearing.
(2) An amendment to a petition requires the same notice as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53(a).] A pleading form of proof of service is inappropriate in Probate; there is a mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service that should be completed.
(3) Notice must have attached to it the procedures for how to make a remote appearance by Zoom and CourtCall, as well as remote public access, as set out at https://sf.courts.ca.gov/divisions/probate-court. [LRSF 14.1 C.6.]
Deadline to provide courtesy copies of the petition and any subsequently filed papers to the assigned examiner is 7/20/26. (An amendment can include supplemental information, but the Judicial Council does not recognize an "amendment and supplement" to a petition. [CRC 7.3.])

Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

EXAMINER: HELEN TROWBRIDGE

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Vladie Viltman appeared via zoom for Dorothy Mae Ward (petitioner).

Mr. Viltman stated that Mr. Melbostad is out of the country until November 16th, and that he will need additional time to file the final distribution. The matter is continued to January 26, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Continued To Nov-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Aug-25-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Jul-14-2025 Continued To Aug-25-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Melbostad for Dorothy Mae Ward and Lula M. Jackson, Administrators (via Zoom).

Mr. Melbostad informed the Court that the real property was sold in mid-June, but he had inadvertently overlooked the deadline to file the petition for final distribution. He reported that a draft petition had been prepared over the weekend and that additional information was needed from the CPA and the probate referee, Amy Harrington. He requested 30 days to complete and file the petition.

The Court continued the matter to August 25, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for filing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close
Off Calendar Jun-16-2025 Continued To Jul-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul Melbostadt for Dorothy Mae Ward and Lula M. Jackson, Co-Administrators (via Zoom).

Counsel reported that occupants of the decedent's home recently vacated and preparations to list and sell the property have begun. Counsel anticipates the property will sell quickly due to its location and condition. Counsel confirmed that an inventory and appraisal of the estate are in progress and a petition for final distribution should be ready to file within six months.

The court set a hearing on status of close for June 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The court took the report on completing the administration under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

_____________________________________________________________________________________________

POST-SCRIPT: 12/19/2024, 8:15 AM

After hearing, the court opted to take the Report of Status of Administration off calendar, as a hearing on Status of Close of Estate was set for 6/16/2025.

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Continued To Dec-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-23-2024 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Paul Melbostad appeared via zoom for Dorthy Mae Ward (petitioner).

Mr. Melbostad stated that he needs more time to complete the inventory and appraisal and requesting a continuance. This Matter is continued to , 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
